name: 31 Room
short_description: Combining shooting with puzzles create unexpected result, which is fun(Sometimes). Play it with your friend!.
detailed_description:
31 Room is a shooter puzzle game that challenges your brain and also your reflexes. Combining physics-based mechanics and strategic mind, the game gives you a fulfilling combination of problem-solving and skill.

Unravel the mystery between the AI (you) and the developers (Nawaf & Mohammed). As you proceed, you get new tools with more complexity in puzzles along with more rewards for solving them.

Designed for two players only, 31 Room is a co-op game—you can't play by alone. Play with a buddy or drop into a random lobby to get through the challenges as a team. (In-game voice chat isn't supported.)
